summary: The diff implements REQ-14 by removing loading spinners and loading state indicators from TabBar.tsx, TabContent.tsx, and useTabs.ts. The Tab interface no longer has isLoading, TabBar renders a Globe icon instead of a loading spinner, TabContent shows the iframe immediately without a loading overlay, and useTabs.ts has isLoading fully removed. The error state UI is preserved. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
